mapper.select: SELECT m.*, a.name AS animal_name, d.name AS doctor_name, o.name AS owner_name FROM medical_record m LEFT JOIN animal a ON m.animal_id = a.id LEFT JOIN owner o ON a.owner_id = o.id LEFT JOIN doctor d ON m.doctor_id = d.id ORDER BY m.id ASC

SELECT m.*, a.name AS animal_name, d.name AS doctor_name, o.name AS owner_name FROM medical_record m LEFT JOIN animal a ON m.animal_id = a.id LEFT JOIN owner o ON a.owner_id = o.id LEFT JOIN doctor d ON m.doctor_id = d.id WHERE m.id = #{id}

SELECT m.*, a.name AS animal_name, d.name AS doctor_name, o.name AS owner_name FROM medical_record m LEFT JOIN animal a ON m.animal_id = a.id LEFT JOIN owner o ON a.owner_id = o.id LEFT JOIN doctor d ON m.doctor_id = d.id WHERE m.symptom LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%') OR a.name LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%') ORDER BY m.id ASC
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO medical_record (animal_id, doctor_id, visit_date, symptom, diagnosis, treatment, cost, payment_status) VALUES (#{animalId}, #{doctorId}, #{visitDate}, #{symptom}, #{diagnosis}, #{treatment}, #{cost}, #{paymentStatus})
mapper.select: SELECT m.*, a.name AS animal_name, d.name AS doctor_name, o.name AS owner_name FROM medical_record m LEFT JOIN animal a ON m.animal_id = a.id LEFT JOIN owner o ON a.owner_id = o.id LEFT JOIN doctor d ON m.doctor_id = d.id ORDER BY m.id ASC LIMIT #{offset}, #{pageSize}

SELECT m.*, a.name AS animal_name, d.name AS doctor_name, o.name AS owner_name FROM medical_record m LEFT JOIN animal a ON m.animal_id = a.id LEFT JOIN owner o ON a.owner_id = o.id LEFT JOIN doctor d ON m.doctor_id = d.id WHERE m.symptom LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%') OR a.name LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%') ORDER BY m.id ASC LIMIT #{offset}, #{pageSize}
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM medical_record m LEFT JOIN animal a ON m.animal_id = a.id WHERE m.symptom LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%') OR a.name LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%')
